data.title: Titan America SA Announces Leadership Change
data.description:
Titan America SA ( (TTAM) ) has issued an update.

Titan America SA announced that Michael Colakides has resigned from his role as Managing Director, effective July 29, 2025, but will continue to serve as a director on the Board. This change was formalized in a meeting held on July 29 and subsequently published in the Belgian Official Gazette, reflecting the company’s adherence to legal and corporate governance protocols.

The most recent analyst rating on (TTAM) stock is a Hold with a $15.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Titan America SA stock, see the TTAM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TTAM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TTAM is a Outperform.

Titan America SA has a strong financial foundation with robust profitability and stable cash flow, making it a solid player in the construction materials industry. Technical analysis suggests some caution with potential medium-term resistance and overbought signals. While the valuation appears reasonable with a decent dividend yield, the lack of a P/E ratio leaves some uncertainty in valuation assessment. Overall, the stock presents a balanced outlook with strong financials tempered by mixed technical signals.

data.title: Atomic Minerals Closes First Tranche of Private Placement
data.description:
The latest update is out from Atomic Minerals Corporation ( (TSE:ATOM) ).

Atomic Minerals Corporation has successfully closed the first tranche of its private placement, raising $125,000 by issuing 2,500,000 units at $0.05 per unit. This financial move is expected to bolster the company’s exploration activities in its uranium-rich properties, potentially enhancing its market position in the junior mining sector.

More about Atomic Minerals Corporation

Atomic Minerals Corporation is a publicly listed exploration company on the TSX Venture Exchange, focusing on identifying exploration opportunities in geologically promising but underexplored regions. The company specializes in uranium projects, with properties located on the Colorado Plateau in the United States and in the Athabasca and Mount Laurier regions in Canada.

Average Trading Volume: 72,771

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$1.61M

data.title: Kaldvik AS Settles Receivable with Share Issuance
data.description:
Ice Fish Farm AS ( (DE:4YYA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Kaldvik AS has resolved to settle a receivable from its acquisition of Mossi ehf. by issuing 1,579,498 new shares to Heimstø AS, a close associate to a primary insider. This move will increase the company’s share capital to NOK 16,826,833.50, divided into 168,268,335 shares, and is subject to regulatory disclosure requirements.

data.title: Intercontinental Exchange Expands Board with New Appointment
data.description:
Intercontinental Exchange ( (ICE) ) has issued an update.

On September 18, 2025, Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (ICE) announced the appointment of The Rt. Hon. the Lord Hill of Oareford CBE to its Board of Directors, expanding the board from 10 to 11 members. Lord Hill, who has a distinguished background in politics and business advisory roles, is expected to bring valuable geopolitical insights to ICE. His appointment is seen as a strategic move to leverage his extensive experience in financial regulation and international negotiations, potentially enhancing ICE’s industry positioning and stakeholder relations.

The most recent analyst rating on (ICE) stock is a Buy with a $200.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Intercontinental Exchange stock, see the ICE Stock Forecast page.

To see Spark’s full report on ICE stock, click here.

More about Intercontinental Exchange

Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (ICE) is a Fortune 500 company that designs, builds, and operates digital networks to connect people to opportunities. It provides financial technology and data services across major asset classes, including futures, equity, and options exchanges, as well as clearing houses like the New York Stock Exchange. ICE also offers markets for trading and clearing energy and environmental products, and provides fixed income, data services, and execution capabilities. Additionally, ICE Mortgage Technology is transforming U.S. housing finance.

data.title: Kala Pharmaceuticals Sets Date for Annual Meeting
data.description:
Kala Pharmaceuticals ( (KALA) ) has provided an update.

On September 16, 2025, the Board of Directors of KALA BIO, Inc. set December 11, 2025, as the date for its annual meeting of stockholders. The company has established deadlines for stockholder proposals, which must comply with the Securities Exchange Act and the company’s by-laws. Proposals must be submitted by October 1, 2025, to be included in the proxy materials. The delay in the meeting date requires stockholders to submit nominations or proposals by September 28, 2025, to be considered.

data.title: Golden Pursuit Resources Unveils New High-Grade Gold Zone at Myrt Lake
data.description:
An update from Golden Pursuit Resources ( (TSE:GDP) ) is now available.

Golden Pursuit Resources Ltd. has completed its 2025 exploration program at the Myrt Lake property in the Gordon Lake gold mining district. The program revealed a new high-grade mineralized zone, with significant gold assay results indicating potential for further exploration. This discovery, along with additional high-grade confirmations, positions the company to enhance its resource base and extend its claims until 2033. The company plans further geophysical and drilling work to validate and expand these findings, which could impact its operations and market positioning by potentially increasing its gold reserves.

More about Golden Pursuit Resources

Golden Pursuit Resources Ltd. operates in the mining industry, focusing on gold exploration and development. The company is primarily engaged in exploring high-grade gold mining districts, such as the Gordon Lake district in Canada’s Northwest Territories.

Average Trading Volume: 17,499

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$7.7M

data.title: IMAC Holdings Issues Promissory Note Amid Board Changes
data.description:
Imac Holdings ( (BACK) ) has issued an announcement.

On September 16, 2025, IMAC Holdings, Inc. issued an unsecured promissory note to a lender for $179,375, with a purchase price of $128,125, maturing on December 24, 2025. The note allows for prepayment without penalty and includes standard representations and covenants, with specific events of default outlined. On September 12, 2025, Michael D. Pruitt resigned from the Board of Directors of IMAC Holdings, Inc., with no disagreements cited. The company will not immediately fill his board position but will reassign his committee roles to existing directors to maintain governance standards.

data.title: NextTrip Converts Promissory Notes to Preferred Stock
data.description:
The latest update is out from NextTrip ( (NTRP) ).

NextTrip, Inc., a Nevada corporation, announced the issuance and sale of restricted shares of its newly designated Series Q Nonvoting Convertible Preferred Stock. On September 15, 2025, the company converted $152,970 in unsecured promissory notes into 47,803 shares of Series Q Preferred Stock, involving two independent directors, Carmen Diges and Stephen Kircher. This conversion was retroactive to September 3, 2025, and the shares are considered restricted securities under the Securities Act.
